name: people-help
description: People Help — AI-powered Employee Experience platform

scripts.seed: python -c "import httpx; c=httpx.Client(timeout=120); print('Seeding knowledge...'); r=c.post('http://127.0.0.1:8000/knowledge/seed'); print(r.json()); print('Seeding workflows...'); r2=c.post('http://127.0.0.1:8000/workflows/definitions/seed'); print(r2.json()); print('Done!')"
